title: rosa trachyphylla var. nitidula
intro: Rosa trachyphylla var. nitidula is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is also known as the fragrant rose or rose of Rambai and is native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Rosa trachyphylla var. nitidula include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting relaxation.
